description: A practical and stylish choice of bag in red from kiara.  Extra roomy and comfortable to carry, the high shine leather effect fabric and boxy shape will give a sophisticated look to any outfit.Height: 24cmWidth: 34cmDepth: 16cmMade of synthetic leather for durability, laminated for high gloss shineHas one large main zipped compartment with strap with magnet closureOne internal zipped pocket, organiser pockets and security clipTwo short handles attached to the bag with a mock twist-lock system, alternate long strap providedSmall pocket on frontBoxy shape with rounded corners and top-stitch decorationCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
